description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in casual urban attire, featuring a zip-up jacket over a shirt with long sleeves extending from underneath. He wears straight-cut pants and a pair of lace-up sneakers, suitable for walking in city environments. A crossbody bag is slung diagonally from his left shoulder to his right hip, adding a practical accessory for carrying personal items. His facial features include a full beard and mustache, and his hair is styled in a short, slightly tousled manner. The figure's hands are relaxed at his sides, and his overall build is average, with realistic human proportions. The clothing and accessories suggest a modern, everyday pedestrian commonly seen in urban settings.
description: A casually dressed adult male with a crossbody bag, sneakers, and a full beard, styled for an urban pedestrian look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the facial features, crossbody bag, zip-up jacket, and sneakers clearly.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the bag's strap, and the layered clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the jacket, pants, and the full length of the bag's strap.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the opposite profile, hand position, and the side seam of the clothing.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket over a long-sleeve shirt and straight-cut pants with a crossbody bag
